app_info.subtitle: Vind evenementen in Gent
app_info.description: Gentse Feesten 2026 helps users search the public festival program, discover events by interest, day, theme, tag, or location, inspect event details, and find free highlights.

justifications.read_only_justification: Searches the local festival dataset and returns matching events without changing data.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not write to public internet state or any third-party system.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Retrieves one event from the local festival dataset by UUID without changing data.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not write to public internet state or any third-party system.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Retrieves one event detail excluding images and video links from the local dataset.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not write to public internet state or any third-party system.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Computes event recommendations from a user's preferences using the local festival dataset.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not write to public internet state or any third-party system.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Lists festival themes and event counts from the local dataset without changing data.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not write to public internet state or any third-party system.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Lists festival dates and event counts from the local dataset without changing data.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not write to public internet state or any third-party system.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Searches event tags derived from the local festival dataset without changing data.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not write to public internet state or any third-party system.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Retrieves events matching a location and optional day from the local dataset.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not write to public internet state or any third-party system.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Selects and ranks free events from the local festival dataset without changing data.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not write to public internet state or any third-party system.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Combines day info, free highlights, and themed picks into one response from the local dataset.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not write to public internet state or any third-party system.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

test_cases.description: Search for accessible free outdoor events on a specific festival day.
test_cases.user_prompt: Welke gratis buitenevenementen zijn rolstoeltoegankelijk op zaterdag 18 juli 2026?
test_cases.expected_output: Returns matching events with dates, times, locations, and relevant accessibility information.

test_cases.description: Recommend events from a natural-language preference.
test_cases.user_prompt: Ik zoek rustige jazz in openlucht tijdens de Gentse Feesten.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns a concise set of relevant festival recommendations and explains why they match.

test_cases.description: Inspect the complete details for a selected event.
test_cases.user_prompt: Geef me alle details voor evenement 9f056750-97bb-4111-aa12-558d87be0c86, inclusief alle tijdstippen, prijs en toegankelijkheid.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns the selected event's complete public details or a clear not-found response for an invalid UUID.

test_cases.description: Find the program at a named festival location on a specific day.
test_cases.user_prompt: Wat is er zondag te doen op de Vrijdagmarkt?
test_cases.expected_output: Returns events at the matching location on that day, ordered by date and time.

test_cases.description: Find the best free festival options for one day.
test_cases.user_prompt: Geef me de beste gratis aanraders voor vrijdag 17 juli 2026
test_cases.expected_output: Returns up to ten ranked free events for the requested day.

test_cases.description: Plan a full festival day combining highlights and themed picks.
test_cases.user_prompt: Plan een dag voor mij op zaterdag 18 juli
test_cases.expected_output: Returns day info, free highlights, and diverse themed picks in one response.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for events outside the Gentse Feesten program.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Welke concerten zijn er volgende maand in Antwerpen?
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because it only covers the Gentse Feesten 2026 program in Gent.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for ticket purchases or reservations.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Koop twee tickets voor een concert vanavond.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because it cannot purchase tickets or make reservations.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for general travel planning unrelated to the festival program.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Boek een hotel en treinreis naar Gent voor dit weekend.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because booking travel and accommodation is outside its supported workflows.
